overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing an armored character exploring a dimly lit futuristic industrial control room. The character approaches a holographic map table, examines the terrain display, and then departs, with the environment featuring metallic architecture and green-red ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi command center with holographic control panels

events.description: character slows and stops at the holographic table

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit control room toward the central holographic display table

entered.detail: exposed industrial piping running along the ceiling with green ambient lighting
rows of computer terminals with glowing screens lining the left wall
large rectangular table with glowing edges in the center of the room
array of digital screens displaying data on the right wall
safety railing along an elevated platform section
open door leading to an adjacent corridor with red lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic industrial control room with green-lit monitors and exposed ceiling pipes, approaching a large holographic table in the center of the room. The environment features metallic surfaces and ambient red emergency lighting.

events.description: character leans in to examine the holographic terrain map on the table
character stops walking and focuses on the map display

agents.ego_description: leaning over the holographic table to study the detailed topographic map display

entered.detail: glowing blue three-dimensional terrain map hovering above the table surface
panel of buttons and controls along the table edge

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the table and leans in to examine the glowing holographic map showing terrain details. The camera focuses closely on the interactive display while the surrounding control room fades from view.

events.description: character turns and walks away from the holographic table
leaving the map station and returning to the open control room area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the map table and walking back toward the room entrance

entered.detail: exposed industrial piping running along the ceiling
rows of computer terminals with glowing screens
array of digital screens displaying data
open door leading to adjacent corridor

segments.scene_description: The character departs from the holographic table, walking back through the control room as the wall monitors and ceiling pipes come back into view, leaving the map station behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial control room that narrows its focus onto a holographic display before expanding back into the wider environment. It begins with the character walking past green-lit monitors and exposed ceiling pipes, moving through a space defined by metallic surfaces and red emergency lighting toward a large central table. As the character stops and leans in, the camera shifts its focus closely onto the glowing holographic map of the terrain, causing the surrounding room to fade from view. The scene then opens back up as the character departs from the station, with the wall monitors and overhead pipes gradually returning to prominence. Finally, the camera follows the character as they walk away, leaving the interactive map behind in the depths of the futuristic facility.
